headline: L3Harris Continues Expansion of Solid Rocket Motor Facilities in Huntsville
summary: HUNTSVILLE, Ala., June 01, 2026--L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has expanded its Advanced Manufacturing Facility-South (AMF-South) in Huntsville with a $25 million investment that includes an additional 130,000 square feet of manufacturing space.
